evals.prompt: Can you do a full UI audit of my app? I want to know if there are any visual inconsistencies or things that look unprofessional
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive report covering visual consistency, polish, mobile responsiveness, interactions, performance, and accessibility - with severity tiers, specific file paths, and plain English fix suggestions

evals.prompt: Review the chat page UI - does it look polished? Flag anything that feels off
evals.expected_output: A focused report on the chat page only, identifying styling inconsistencies, polish issues, and UX problems specific to the chat interface

evals.prompt: I feel like my app looks a little rough around the edges but I can't pinpoint why. Can you take a look?
evals.expected_output: A report that identifies subtle polish issues and inconsistencies that contribute to the rough feeling, organized by severity with actionable fixes
